title: Lululemon announces UK-wide loyalty program with free next-day shipping
snippet: Lululemon is testing a membership beta in major UK cities, offering free express delivery and priority access to limited edition drops, intensifying conversion competition.

classification.summary: Lululemon is launching a UK-wide loyalty program featuring free next-day shipping and priority access to limited editions, aiming to enhance customer retention. This initiative represents a strategic expansion of their brand engagement efforts in key markets.
